name: Chuck Gipp Decorah Fish Hatchery (Trout Run)
notes: Open sunrise to sunset year-round; fish Trout Run by the hatchery.

name: Backbone State Park (Richmond Springs)
notes: Stocked twice weekly April-October; wild browns present.

name: South Bear Creek access (Highlandville)
notes: Weekly stockings April-October; strong wild brown population.

name: Waterloo Creek access (Dorchester)
notes: Driftless stream stocked weekly in season.

name: Bloody Run Creek county park (Marquette)
notes: Stocked weekly in season along the US-18 corridor.

name: Manchester Fish Hatchery (Spring Branch Creek)
notes: Spring-fed creek by the DNR hatchery; stocked at least twice monthly.
